title: Dranergize Dragon Origin
description: Adds a new custom race Dranergize Dragon, FutaraDragon.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zAE6wBoC_3o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Dranergize Dragon Specie Origin

Add unique dragon origin that work with Figura mod allow to perform more in depth about how minecraft combat work and how Visual effect can possible be in Minecraft world

By FutaraDragon

Mod Require For Active this mod

[Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)

[Figura Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura)

Base Figura Model can download from here

This model can be edit can remake recolor as your version

[Figura Dragon Model](https://futaradragon.info/minecraft/file/FutaraDragon_Race_Figura_Model_v2_5_00.zip)

Some compatibility issue
with "Zenith" mod - sometime velocity increase too much when dash with roll dash ability

How to setup model for this origin
![How To Use Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FDZArn40/images/70d173a25ff590f621eaf98bbbbae3b5aa4c8c43.png)

How to edit dragon model (safe mode)

[example model result from screen shot](https://futaradragon.info/minecraft/file/DecoraDragon_Figura_Model.zip)
![How To Edit Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FDZArn40/images/67c47fc1b733fa1c509cebda375b78db1aa3887d.png)

Advance custom model (this will be rawr for you so it require a lot of knowledge)

Original Model With Animation
[Model File](https://futaradragon.info/minecraft/file/FutaraDragonModel.bbmodel)
And Web App To Convert Animation To Code
[Animation Convert Web App](https://futaradragon.info/app_minecraft/minecraftfigurabbanimationport.html)
![How To Custom Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FDZArn40/images/112d98f795b36f9755742fb67af6125b24a4403d.png)
